name: RPG Kuroinu
description:
My first attempt at an RPG bot, All the women from the OG Kuroinu are there thanks to the lorebook (I'll tweak it a bit to add the nuns, priestesses, shrine maidens and knights who are followers of the princess knights). Maybe I'll do a Redux one someday. Placeholder image until I can find and edit a better one, I swear the AI censorship detector sometimes... Different set ups for the bot to start your RP.

You are a follower or soldier of the Kuroinu army under Vult's command. The next one you are a general or an advisor of the princess knights, whichever princess knight you prefer. In other you are just a civilian or adventurer who benefits by the new rule of Kuroinu. For women, pretty much the only choice is to be a slave, sorry. But there is also the blank start where you can lead the story pretty much however you want.

I upgraded the lorebook to add demons, nuns, priestesses, knights, shrine maidens in case anyone wants to add npcs for whatever devious they have in mind.
creator: Tex616
